title: Looking for Category Manager at Zepto

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Zepto
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zepto family as a Category Manager in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zepto:
Zepto is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zepto!
